title: ActiveSG Membership
text:
ActiveSG Membership - SupportGoWhere
ActiveSG Membership
Share link
A national movement for individuals, families and communities to experience and share the joy of living better through sports.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Free entry to ActiveSG swimming pools and gyms for Singaporeans aged 65 and above
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Swimming complexes and gym admissions

Payment for ActiveSG programmes and activities (up to 30% of the programme price)

Booking of ActiveSG sport facilities 

Purchase of MyActiveGYM™ and MyActiveSWIM™ schemes

Other benefits:

Invitation to exclusive members' events

Eligibility to purchase MyActiveGYM™ and MyActiveSWIM™ schemes

Supplementary membership – parents/legal guardians can apply for supplementary membership for children under 15 years old

Active Health Lab access

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents

Those who are below 15 years old are eligible for supplementary membership, tagged to the accounts of their parents/guardians

How to apply?

You can apply here.




For supplementary account:

Parents/legal guardians can apply for supplementary membership for children under 15 years old.




Where can I find help?

View more details

SportsSG hotline: 1800 344 1177
Operating hours: Mon - Fri 9.00am - 6.00pm (closed on Public Holidays)

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit your enquiry

Visit your nearest Sport Centre

Scheme last updated 23 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
